content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the uh1 branch delta against fork point 2655e46f. Changes rename BackendPolicyRole::Planner → Planning (with serde rename="planner"/alias="planning" preserving wire compatibility), rename planner_family_for_cycle → primary_family_for_cycle, refresh panel_contracts.rs and diagnostics.rs comments to drop the 'planner-family' terminology, add a direct-vote-flow note to docs/templates.md, and relabel final_review:voter summaries and a legacy-field snapshot test. All acceptance criteria hold: rg -n "BackendPolicyRole::Planner" returns no matches in src/ or tests/; no 'planner_positions' references remain in docs/; no 'Planner position.' entries remain in scenarios.rs; requirements_drafting planner references are correctly left untouched. cargo check passes; backend_policy_test (17/17), backend_diagnostics_test (91/91), project_run_record_test (134/134) all pass. Clippy failures exist but reproduce on the base branch and are pre-existing, not introduced here. Minor stylistic quirks (display_name returning "Planning" while as_str returns "planner"; renamed legacy-snapshot test using a generic field name) are observable but not bugs — display_name is not called on BackendPolicyRole anywhere, and serde already ignores all unknown fields via default. No correctness, safety, or maintainability issues warranting amendments.

## Amendments

None.
